task_completion.description: Open and read the reverberation mapping schedule
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal window displaying the contents of '~/Documents/reverb_mapping_schedule.txt'.

task_completion.description: Slew the telescope to the target galaxy NGC 4151
task_completion.visual_evidence: KStars GUI showing NGC 4151 centered on the sky map, or the telescope mount control panel showing coordinates near RA 12.1755 hours and Dec 39.4058 degrees.

task_completion.description: Capture V-band continuum frames into the isolated 'V/' directory
task_completion.visual_evidence: Ekos capture module showing a sequence configured for V-band (Filter slot 2), 60s exposure, and at least 10 count, saving to a directory ending in 'V/'. Alternatively, a file manager/terminal showing .fits files inside '/home/ga/Images/reverb/ngc4151/V/'.

task_completion.description: Capture H-alpha frames into the isolated 'Ha/' directory
task_completion.visual_evidence: Ekos capture module showing a sequence configured for H-alpha (Filter slot 5), 120s exposure, and at least 8 count, saving to a directory ending in 'Ha/'. Alternatively, a file manager/terminal showing .fits files inside '/home/ga/Images/reverb/ngc4151/Ha/'.

task_completion.description: Generate the reference sky view using the provided script
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal window showing the execution of the command 'bash ~/capture_sky_view.sh ~/Images/reverb/ngc4151/reference_fov.png 0.5 --palette vibrant' or an image viewer displaying the generated reference_fov.png.

task_completion.description: Write the observation log containing target and filter details
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor showing the file '/home/ga/Documents/ngc4151_obs_log.txt' with contents mentioning the target (NGC 4151) and the filters used (V-band and H-alpha).

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the KStars/Ekos application to capture frames rather than mocking files
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots must show the KStars/Ekos GUI with the capture sequence running or configured. The agent should not just use terminal 'touch' or 'cp' commands to create dummy .fits files.

integrity.description: Verify that V-band and H-alpha frames are strictly isolated in their respective directories
integrity.visual_evidence: File manager or terminal listings should show no mixing of V-band and Ha-band files; 'V/' should only contain V-band captures and 'Ha/' should only contain Ha-band captures.

integrity.description: Verify the sky view was generated by running the actual script
integrity.visual_evidence: A terminal window should show the agent typing and executing the 'capture_sky_view.sh' script with the correct arguments, rather than downloading or moving a pre-existing image.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target: NGC 4151 (RA 12.1755 hours, Dec 39.4058 degrees). V-band requirements: Filter slot 2, 60s exposure, minimum 10 frames, saved to '/home/ga/Images/reverb/ngc4151/V/'. Ha-band requirements: Filter slot 5, 120s exposure, minimum 8 frames, saved to '/home/ga/Images/reverb/ngc4151/Ha/'. Sky view command: 'bash ~/capture_sky_view.sh ~/Images/reverb/ngc4151/reference_fov.png 0.5 --palette vibrant'. Observation log must be at '/home/ga/Documents/ngc4151_obs_log.txt'.
